operations.expected:
def add(a: int, b: int) -> int:
    return a - b
operations.reason: Fix subtraction used where addition is required by the test.
operations.replacement:
def add(a: int, b: int) -> int:
    return a + b

problem:
calculator.add implements 'def add(a: int, b: int) -> int:
    return a - b' at line 9; the test requires add(2, 3) == 5.
title: Fix calculator.add to use addition
